description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read the Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip has binaries built against older fan control versions; use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), Check the readme file inside the archive first to configure it to work!
Changes in this release:
AlienFX-GUI:
- The option "Use WMI sensors` removed from settings as useless after new monitoring procedure
- Bug fixed: Memory leak in Event monitoring procedure
LightFx emulator:
- A 32-bit (x86) version was added for older game compatibility. Now it's 2 subfolders in LightFx folder of the tools - one with the x64 version and one with the x86 version.
